javascript:(function%20()%20%7B%0A'use%20strict'%3B%0Aconst%20VERSION%20%3D%20'0.1.0'%3B%0Aconst%20GLOBAL%20%3D%20'GarminRaceTracker'%3B%0Aconst%20DEFAULTS%20%3D%20%7B%0AmapName%3A%20''%2C%0ArefreshMs%3A%2060000%2C%0AstaleAfterMin%3A%2015%2C%0AfeedUrl%3A%20''%2C%0AwaypointsUrl%3A%20''%2C%0AroutesUrl%3A%20''%2C%0AcollectionsUrl%3A%20''%2C%0AshowMapFeatures%3A%20true%2C%0AmockMe%3A%20false%2C%0AautoFit%3A%20true%2C%0AleafletCss%3A%20'https%3A%2F%2Funpkg.com%2Fleaflet%401.9.4%2Fdist%2Fleaflet.css'%2C%0AleafletJs%3A%20'https%3A%2F%2Funpkg.com%2Fleaflet%401.9.4%2Fdist%2Fleaflet.js'%2C%0A%7D%3B%0Aconst%20cfg%20%3D%20Object.assign(%7B%7D%2C%20DEFAULTS%2C%20window.GARMIN_TRACKER_CONFIG%20%7C%7C%20%7B%7D)%3B%0Acfg.mapName%20%3D%20cfg.mapName%20%7C%7C%20inferMapName()%3B%0Aif%20(!cfg.mapName)%20%7B%0Aconsole.warn('MapShare%20Companion%3A%20open%20a%20public%20MapShare%20page%20like%20https%3A%2F%2Fshare.garmin.com%2F%3Cname%3E%20first.')%3B%0Areturn%3B%0A%7D%0Acfg.feedUrl%20%3D%20cfg.feedUrl%20%7C%7C%20%60%2Ffeed%2Fshare%2F%24%7BencodeURIComponent(cfg.mapName)%7D%60%3B%0Acfg.waypointsUrl%20%3D%20cfg.waypointsUrl%20%7C%7C%20%60%2F%24%7BencodeURIComponent(cfg.mapName)%7D%2FWaypoints%60%3B%0Acfg.routesUrl%20%3D%20cfg.routesUrl%20%7C%7C%20%60%2F%24%7BencodeURIComponent(cfg.mapName)%7D%2Froutes%2F%60%3B%0Acfg.collectionsUrl%20%3D%20cfg.collectionsUrl%20%7C%7C%20%60%2F%24%7BencodeURIComponent(cfg.mapName)%7D%2FCollections%60%3B%0Aif%20(window%5BGLOBAL%5D%20%26%26%20typeof%20window%5BGLOBAL%5D.destroy%20%3D%3D%3D%20'function')%20%7B%0Awindow%5BGLOBAL%5D.destroy()%3B%0A%7D%0Aconst%20state%20%3D%20%7B%0Aoverlay%3A%20null%2C%0Amap%3A%20null%2C%0Alayers%3A%20null%2C%0AfeatureLayers%3A%20null%2C%0AwaypointLayer%3A%20null%2C%0ArouteLayer%3A%20null%2C%0AtrackLayer%3A%20null%2C%0AracerMarker%3A%20null%2C%0AmeMarker%3A%20null%2C%0AaccuracyCircle%3A%20null%2C%0Aconnector%3A%20null%2C%0AracerTrail%3A%20null%2C%0ArefreshTimer%3A%20null%2C%0AgeoWatch%3A%20null%2C%0AmockTimer%3A%20null%2C%0Aracer utton()%3B%0A%7D%20catch%20(err)%20%7B%0Aconsole.warn('Map%20feature%20load%20failed'%2C%20err)%3B%0A%7D%0A%7D%0Aasync%20function%20fetchJson(url)%20%7B%0Aconst%20res%20%3D%20await%20fetch(addCacheBust(url)%2C%20%7B%20cache%3A%20'no-store'%2C%20credentials%3A%20'same-origin'%2C%20headers%3A%20%7B%20Accept%3A%20'application%2Fjson'%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%0Aif%20(!res.ok)%20throw%20new%20Error(%60%24%7Burl%7D%20HTTP%20%24%7Bres.status%7D%60)%3B%0Areturn%20res.json()%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20normalizeWaypoints(data)%20%7B%0Aconst%20arr%20%3D%20Array.isArray(data)%20%3F%20data%20%3A%20(data%20%26%26%20data.Waypoints)%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D%3B%0Areturn%20arr.map((w)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%0Aid%3A%20w.D%20%3F%3F%20w.ID%20%3F%3F%20w.Id%2C%0Aname%3A%20w.X%20%7C%7C%20w.Name%20%7C%7C%20w.Label%20%7C%7C%20'WP'%2C%0Alat%3A%20Number(w.L%20%3F%3F%20w.Latitude)%2C%0Alon%3A%20Number(w.N%20%3F%3F%20w.Longitude)%2C%0Aicon%3A%20w.I%20%3F%3F%20w.IconIndex%2C%0A%7D)).filter((w)%20%3D%3E%20Number.isFinite(w.lat)%20%26%26%20Number.isFinite(w.lon))%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20normalizeRoutes(data)%20%7B%0Aconst%20arr%20%3D%20Array.isArray(data)%20%3F%20data%20%3A%20(data%20%26%26%20data.Routes)%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D%3B%0Areturn%20arr.map((r)%20%3D%3E%20(%7B%0Aid%3A%20r.RouteID%20%3F%3F%20r.ID%20%3F%3F%20r.Id%2C%0Aname%3A%20r.Label%20%7C%7C%20r.Name%20%7C%7C%20'Route'%2C%0Acolor%3A%20r.ColorHex%20%7C%7C%20'%23ff0000'%2C%0Apoints%3A%20(r.Points%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D).map((p)%20%3D%3E%20%5BNumber(p.L%20%3F%3F%20p.Latitude)%2C%20Number(p.N%20%3F%3F%20p.Longitude)%5D).filter((p)%20%3D%3E%20Number.isFinite(p%5B0%5D)%20%26%26%20Number.isFinite(p%5B1%5D))%2C%0A%7D)).filter((r)%20%3D%3E%20r.points.length%20%3E%3D%202)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20renderMapFeatures()%20%7B%0Aconst%20L%20%3D%20window.L%3B%0Aif%20(!L%20%7C%7C%20!state.routeLayer%20%7C%7C%20!state.waypointLayer)%20return%3B%0Astate.routeLayer.clearLayers()%3B%0Astate.waypointLayer.clearLayers()%3B%0Afor%20(const%20route%20of%20state.mapFeatures.routes)%20%7B%0Aconst%20line%20%3 p'%2C%0AiconSize%3A%20%5B34%2C%2034%5D%2C%0AiconAnchor%3A%20%5B17%2C%2017%5D%2C%0ApopupAnchor%3A%20%5B0%2C%20-18%5D%2C%0Ahtml%3A%20%60%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22grt-me-icon%22%3E%3Cdiv%20class%3D%22grt-me-arrow%22%20style%3D%22transform%3Arotate(%24%7BNumber.isFinite(next.heading)%20%3F%20next.heading%20%3A%200%7Ddeg)%3Bopacity%3A%24%7BNumber.isFinite(next.heading)%20%3F%201%20%3A%200.25%7D%22%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%3C%2Fdiv%3E%60%2C%0A%7D)%3B%0Aif%20(!state.meMarker)%20%7B%0Astate.meMarker%20%3D%20L.marker(ll%2C%20%7B%20icon%2C%20zIndexOffset%3A%205000%2C%20title%3A%20'Me'%20%7D).addTo(state.layers)%3B%0A%7D%20else%20%7B%0Astate.meMarker.setLatLng(ll)%3B%0Astate.meMarker.setIcon(icon)%3B%0A%7D%0Astate.meMarker.bindPopup(mePopup(next))%3B%0Aif%20(!state.accuracyCircle)%20%7B%0Astate.accuracyCircle%20%3D%20L.circle(ll%2C%20accuracyStyle(next.accuracy)).addTo(state.layers)%3B%0A%7D%20else%20%7B%0Astate.accuracyCircle.setLatLng(ll)%3B%0Astate.accuracyCircle.setRadius(next.accuracy%20%7C%7C%200)%3B%0A%7D%0AupdateConnector()%3B%0AupdatePanel()%3B%0AmaybeInitialFit()%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20accuracyStyle(accuracy)%20%7B%0Areturn%20%7B%20radius%3A%20accuracy%20%7C%7C%200%2C%20color%3A%20'%231a73e8'%2C%20weight%3A%202%2C%20opacity%3A%200.65%2C%20fillColor%3A%20'%231a73e8'%2C%20fillOpacity%3A%200.12%2C%20interactive%3A%20false%20%7D%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20updateConnector()%20%7B%0Aif%20(!state.connector)%20return%3B%0Aif%20(state.racer%20%26%26%20state.me)%20state.connector.setLatLngs(%5B%5Bstate.me.lat%2C%20state.me.lon%5D%2C%20%5Bstate.racer.lat%2C%20state.racer.lon%5D%5D)%3B%0Aelse%20state.connector.setLatLngs(%5B%5D)%3B%0A%7D%0Afunction%20updatePanel()%20%7B%0Aconst%20r%20%3D%20state.racer%3B%0Aif%20(!r)%20return%3B%0Aconst%20stale%20%3D%20staleMinutes(r)%3B%0Aconst%20staleText%20%3D%20stale%20!%3D%20null%20%26%26%20stale%20%3E%20cfg.staleAfterMin%20%3F%20%60stale%20%24%7BMath.round(stale)%7D%20min%60%20%3A%20'live'%3B%0AsetText('racer-status'%2C%20r.gpsFix%20%3D%3D%3D%20'False'%20%3F%20'
